nodes.proof:
apply isFilter_if.
- intro xs; induction xs as [|x xs IH].
-- sfirstorder.
-- hauto lq: on.
- exact CLOSED_UPWARD.
attempts:
apply isFilter_if; [| exact CLOSED_UPWARD]. intros xs H_all. induction xs as [| x xs IH]; simpl.
- destruct NONEMPTY as [x0 Hx0]. apply (CLOSED_UPWARD x0 Hx0 trueB). sfirstorder.
- apply (CLOSED_MEET x (andsB xs) (H_all x (or_introl eq_refl)) (IH (fun y Hy => H_all y (or_intror Hy)))).

refine (isFilter_if _ CLOSED_UPWARD). intros xs H. induction xs as [| x xs' IH].
- simpl. destruct NONEMPTY as [x0 Hx0]. destruct BOOLEAN_ALGEBRA_LAWS as [ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ trueB_id_andB _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _]. destruct (trueB_id_andB x0) as [Hleft Hright]. eapply CLOSED_UPWARD; [eapply Hx0 | apply Hright].
- simpl. apply CLOSED_MEET; [apply H; left | apply IH; intros y Hy; apply H; right; exact Hy].
